org.springframework.data.repository.aot.generate.MethodContributor

Packages that use MethodContributor
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.repository.aot.generate
Ahead-of-Time (AOT) generation for Spring Data repositories.

  • Uses of MethodContributor in org.springframework.data.repository.aot.generate

    Methods in org.springframework.data.repository.aot.generate that return MethodContributor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MethodContributor<M>
    MethodContributor.QueryMethodContributorBuilder.contribute(MethodContributor.RepositoryMethodContribution contribution)
    Terminal method accepting a consumer that uses AotRepositoryMethodBuilder to build the method.
    protected @Nullable MethodContributor<? extends QueryMethod>
    RepositoryContributor.contributeQueryMethod(Method method)
    Customization hook for store implementations to contribute a query method.
    MethodContributor<M>
    MethodContributor.QueryMethodMetadataContributorBuilder.metadataOnly(QueryMetadata metadata)
    Terminal method accepting QueryMetadata to build the MethodContributor.
